title: The White, the Yellow, and the Black
original_title: Il bianco, il giallo, il nero
overview: The White, the Yellow, and the Black (Italian: Il bianco, il giallo, il nero, also known as Shoot First… Ask Questions Later) is a 1975 Spaghetti Western comedy film.  It is the last spaghetti western directed by Sergio Corbucci. Differently from his previous western films, this is openly parodic.
